days.title: Arrival in Paris
days.subtitle: Getting Acquainted with the City of Light

timeline.title: Arrive at Gare du Nord
timeline.detail: Your Eurostar train arrives at Gare du Nord station in Paris. Exit through the main hall and follow signs to the nearby taxi rank or Metro for easy transport into the city.

timeline.title: Check in to Le Rocroy Hotel
timeline.detail: Settle into this stylish hotel located just a 5-minute walk from Gare du Nord. Enjoy modern amenities and a breakfast buffet to start your stay.

timeline.title: Visit Montmartre
timeline.detail: Stroll through the charming artist district of Montmartre. Visit the iconic Sacré-Cœur Basilica for panoramic views of the city and explore the artistic streets.

timeline.title: Dinner at Le Consulat
timeline.detail: Enjoy French cuisine at this quaint Montmartre restaurant. Try the duck confit and local wines, all served in a lovely setting that feels authentic.

timeline.title: Eiffel Tower Night Visit
timeline.detail: End your day at the Eiffel Tower to enjoy its stunning night lights. Book tickets in advance to skip the lines and take memorable photos from the top.
timeline.mapQuery: Eiffel Tower, Champ de Mars, Paris, France

timeline.title: Return to Hotel
timeline.detail: Head back to your hotel to get a good night's rest after a fulfilling day of explorations.

localTips: Buy a carnet (book of 10 tickets) for the Metro from any station to save money.
Consider reserving Eiffel Tower tickets online to avoid long queues.
Check for local bakery specials for fresh pastries throughout your visit.

days.title: Exploring Iconic Parisian Landmarks
days.subtitle: A Day Full of History and Culture

timeline.title: Breakfast at Café de Flore
timeline.detail: Start your day with a classic French breakfast of croissants and café au lait at this historic café in Saint-Germain-des-Prés.

timeline.title: Louvre Museum Visit
timeline.detail: Explore the world's largest art museum and a historic monument. Don't miss the Mona Lisa and impressive architecture. Pre-book timed entry tickets online.
timeline.mapQuery: Louvre Museum, Rue de Rivoli, Paris, France

timeline.title: Lunch at Le Fumoir
timeline.detail: Enjoy contemporary French cuisine in a stylish dining space just steps from the Louvre. The seasonal dishes and desserts are highly recommended.

timeline.title: Explore Notre-Dame Cathedral
timeline.detail: Visit the iconic Notre-Dame Cathedral, famous for its French Gothic architecture. Although restoration is ongoing, admire the exterior and surrounding Île de la Cité.

timeline.title: Walk Along the Seine River
timeline.detail: Take a leisurely stroll along the Seine, enjoying views of historic bridges and landmarks. The scenic atmosphere is perfect for photography and relaxation.

timeline.title: Dinner at Bouillon Pigalle
timeline.detail: Enjoy traditional Parisian dishes in a bustling brasserie. The escargots and French onion soup are highly rated by regulars.

timeline.title: Evening Seine River Cruise
timeline.detail: Experience Paris from the water on a Seine river cruise. Book tickets in advance for spectacular views of illuminated landmarks.

localTips: Purchase museum passes for more savings if you plan on visiting multiple sites.
Book dinner reservations for popular spots like Bouillon Pigalle.
Check for local boulangeries for snacks during the day!

days.title: Leisure Day in Paris
days.subtitle: Last Moments of Parisian Charm

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hôtel de Ville
timeline.detail: Enjoy a breakfast within view of the stunning Hôtel de Ville. Savor fresh pastries and excellent coffee while people-watching.

timeline.title: Day Trip to Versailles
timeline.detail: Travel to the magnificent Palace of Versailles. Explore the vast gardens and opulent rooms. Reserve your train tickets and entry online to ensure a smooth visit.

timeline.title: Explore the Palace of Versailles
timeline.detail: Step inside the grand Palace of Versailles, known for its rich history and architecture. Allocate time to wander through the gardens and Marie Antoinette's estate.

timeline.title: Lunch at La Petite Venise
timeline.detail: Have lunch in the heart of the Versailles gardens. Enjoy a meal in a charming setting surrounded by stunning scenery.

timeline.title: Return to Paris
timeline.detail: Head back to Paris late afternoon, allowing time to relax before your evening departure. Consider a final stroll near your hotel.

timeline.title: Farewell Dinner at Le Train Bleu
timeline.detail: Enjoy your last meal in Paris at this iconic restaurant located in the Gare de Lyon. Experience the exquisite decor and delectable French cuisine.

localTips: Wear comfortable shoes for walking around Versailles and the gardens.
Check train schedules for efficient travel to and from Versailles.
Capture the last moments with photos near the Eiffel Tower at sunset.

hotels.note: 5-min walk from Gare du Nord, modern facilities
